title: TIME TO SHRED IT - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY EVENT CENTER TIME TO SHRED IT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Bring up to four “banker” boxes or six brown paper grocery bags filled with paper to be shredded. The event will also dispose of old prescriptions and will be recycling old eye glasses, hearing aids, and cell phones. Hard drive wiping services will be available for $5 per device. 694 NE 4th Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday, March 10, 2026 10am-2pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Drive in the Red Parking Lot FEES: $5 donation suggested per box DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Identity Theft Prevention Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs Medication Disposal If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY EVENT CENTER
